title: malcolmia cabulica
intro: Malcolmia cabulica, also known as Kabul Stock or White Stock, is a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Malcolmia cabulica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Malcolmia cabulica is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
